title: verilator does not write parameter and localparam values into .vcd file
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 706 from https://www.veripool.org

---

This is useful for debug.

VCS does write parameter and localparam values into waveform file.
